privileged_info_summary: The task is a fully generative synthetic exercise requiring the creation of a new EdrawMax PERT diagram from scratch. Verified the expected output paths (/home/ga/Diagrams/pert_migration.eddx and .png), the required textual activity labels, and the title text requirement exactly match the explicit instructions provided in the prompt and verifier.py logic.
